sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47113" key="h(mi/kentros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-κεντρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-way between cardinal points</tr_>, prob. in Jul.Laod.in<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).190</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
